summary: Final QA rerun completed for consolidated root/supervisor setup. Backend regression suite and full UI integration journey now pass, including landing assets, auth, revenue-trigger strategy, logs, reports, and privacy export/delete.

minor.issue: base_url fixture still includes localhost fallback (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL default), which conflicts with strict env-only policy for endpoint resolution.

action_items: Optional hardening: remove localhost fallback from pytest base_url fixture and fail fast if REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is unset.
Optional cleanup: resolve workspace lockfile ambiguity warning in Next startup logs to avoid future root-detection instability.
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking backend/frontend functional defects found in this run.
Maintain strict environment-variable-only URL policy in tests (avoid localhost defaults).
seed_data_creation: Created one temporary account via UI registration for E2E privacy deletion validation; account was deleted within test flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Revalidated previous blockers: static assets and authenticated runtime paths are now functioning. Pytest (28 tests) all passing. UI E2E with new account passed through onboarding→dashboard→revenue→logs→weekly/monthly reports→settings export/delete, and deleted-account login correctly stayed on /login.
rca of the issue: Prior runtime failures (Prisma native binding/static chunk errors) were not reproducible in this iteration. Current app behavior indicates root consolidation/supervisor compatibility refresh is effective. Remaining observations are non-blocking hardening items.
mocked_api: No MOCKED APIs used in this run.
